sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: SHOPIFY INC.의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출이 28억 4,400만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 32% 증가했습니다.
잉여현금흐름 마진이 18%로 전분기 성과를 상회하며 9분기 연속 두 자릿수를 기록했습니다.
GMV는 920억 1,300만 달러로 전년 동기 697억 1,500만 달러 대비 성장했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 3분기 매출 성장률과 잉여현금흐름 마진 모두 2분기 실적을 상회했습니다.
4분기 주식기반보상 비용은 1억 3,000만 달러로 전망되며, 잉여현금흐름 마진은 3분기를 소폭 상회할 것으로 예상됩니다.
경영진은 성장과 수익성을 균형 있게 달성하는 실행력을 강조했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출총이익은 13억 9,100만 달러로 전년 동기 11억 1,800만 달러 대비 증가했습니다.
3분기 매출 28억 4,400만 달러는 전년 동기 21억 6,200만 달러 대비 큰 폭으로 성장했습니다.
잉여현금흐름 마진 18%는 전분기 대비 개선된 수치입니다.

watchItems.text: 9분기 연속 두 자릿수 잉여현금흐름 마진 달성이 지속될지 여부가 핵심 관심 지표입니다.
4분기 및 연간 실적에서 32% 매출 성장 모멘텀의 지속 여부를 주목해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991pressreleaseq320.htm EX-99.1 Document Shopify Beats Across the Board: Q3 Shows Growth, Efficiency, Brand Wins Internet, Everywhere - November 4, 2025 - Shopify Inc. (NASDAQ, TSX: SHOP) announced today financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2025. Shopify achieved 32% revenue growth and 18% free cash flow margin , marking nine consecutive quarters of double-digit free cash flow margins. Harley Finkelstein, President of Shopify said, “We build. We ship. We grow. That’s the model - and it’s running at full speed. From entrepreneurs making their very first sale on Shopify every 26 seconds, to global icons like Estée Lauder, we’re powering growth across the full spectrum of commerce. That scale fuels relentless momentum: GMV up 32%, revenue up 32%, free cash flow margin at 18%. Retail’s busiest season is here, and, as always, Shopify merchants are built for i

t." “Our third quarter results show what’s possible when merchant ambition and success meet Shopify’s disciplined execution,” said Jeff Hoffmeister, Chief Financial Officer of Shopify. “We’re not just growing—we’re delivering consistent growth and profitability, quarter after quarter. Q3 was a standout quarter with revenue growth and free cash flow margins both surpassing our robust Q2 performance.” Selected Business Performance Information (1) (In US $ millions, except percentages) Three months ended September 30, 2025 September 30, 2024 GMV 92,013 69,715 MRR 193 175 Revenue 2,844 2,162 Gross profit 1,391 1,118 Operating income 343 283 Free cash flow 507 421 YoY revenue growth rate 32 % 26 % Free cash flow margin 18 % 19 % (1) See endnotes below for definitions of GMV a  Normalized numeric aliases: 92,013 million = 920억 1,300만 달러; 69,715 million = 697억 1,500만 달러; 2,844 million = 28억 4,400만 달러; 2,162 million = 21억 6,200만 달러; 1,391 million = 13억 9,100만 달러; 1,118 million = 11억 1,800만 달러.

tock-based compensation to be $130 million; and • Free cash flow margin to be slightly above Q3 2025. Quarterly Conference Call Shopify’s management team will hold a conference call to discuss our third-quarter results today, November 4, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The conference call will be webcast on the investor relations section of Shopify’s website at www.shopifyinvestors.com/news-and-events . An archived replay of the webcast will be available following the conclusion of the call. Shopify’s Form 10-Q for the quarter ended September 30, 2025, including the unaudited Condensed Consolidated Financial Statements and accompanying Notes, and Management's Discussion and Analysis, will be available on Shopify’s website at www.shopify.com and will be filed on EDGAR at www.sec.gov and on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca . About Shopify Shopify is a leading global commerce company that provides essenti  Normalized numeric aliases: $130 million = 1억 3,000만 달러; $130 = 130달러.
